name: Simple Salisbury Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the soup, beef, bread crumbs, beaten egg, and onion.
2. Shape the mixture firmly into 6 patties.
3. In a skillet over medium-high heat, cook the patties, a few at a time, until browned on both sides.
4. Spoon off any excess fat.
5. Stir in the remaining soup and mushrooms; return the patties to the skillet.
6. Reduce the heat to low and cover. Simmer for 20 minutes, or until cooked through, turning the patties occasionally.
